releaseNotes:
• Fix: multi-view audio no longer lingers 5 seconds after exit.
• Fix: editing a source now preserves its auto-detected connection limit.
• Improvement: the source list now shows each provider connection limit next to the source type, so you can see the multi-view gating at a glance.
• Improvement: large Xtream source refreshes are 16x faster.
• Improvement: assign a pastel color to each source for quick visual identification in the channel list.
• Fix: multi-view layout ceiling now correctly sums connection limits across all enabled sources instead of using the minimum.
